---
title: Custom Template Test
_quarto:
  tests:
    custom-tmpl-html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["CUSTOM-TEMPLATE-ACTIVE", "<p>Extension provides a custom HTML template.</p>"]
        - []
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - ["div.custom-template-marker"]
        - []
---

Extension provides a custom HTML template.
